meta.author: NoxDev sample
meta.summary: A tiny self-contained module for the ONE-OFF front door: cross a bridge by paying a toll (or fighting). Minimal setup, played straight to an ending — no campaign, no long-term store.

passages.title: The Toll Bridge
passages.text: A rope bridge sways over a gorge, and squatting at its head is a goblin with a ledger and a rusty halberd. 'Toll,' it says, 'or trial.'

choices.text: Pay the toll and cross in peace.
Refuse, and take the trial by arms.

passages.title: Trial by Arms
passages.text: The goblin is quicker than it looks. Test your Skill.

passages.title: Across
passages.text: Coin changes hands. The goblin waves you over its bridge with a bored flourish, and the far side is yours.

passages.title: The Bridge Won
passages.text: The goblin yields its halberd and its bridge, grumbling about the paperwork. You cross as victor.

passages.title: Thrown Back
passages.text: The halberd catches you and you reel back off the bridge-head, bleeding, the gorge uncrossed.
